class SummaryRanges {
private:
    set<int> sorted_nums;
public:
    SummaryRanges() {}
    
    void addNum(int value) {
        sorted_nums.insert(value);
    }
    
    vector<vector<int>> getIntervals() {
        vector<vector<int>> result;
        if (sorted_nums.empty()) return result;
        
        auto it = sorted_nums.begin();
        int current_start = *it;
        int current_end = *it;
        
        for (++it; it != sorted_nums.end(); ++it) {
            int num = *it;
            if (num == current_end + 1) {
                current_end = num;
            } else {
                result.push_back({current_start, current_end});
                current_start = num;
                current_end = num;
            }
        }
        result.push_back({current_start, current_end});
        return result;
    }
};

solution: ```cpp
class SummaryRanges {
private:
    std::set<int> sorted_nums;
public:
    SummaryRanges() {}
    
    void addNum(int value) {
        sorted_nums.insert(value);
    }
    
    vector<vector<int>> getIntervals() {
        vector<vector<int>> result;
        if (sorted_nums.empty()) return result;
        
        auto it = sorted_nums.begin();
        int current_start = *it;
        int current_end = *it;
        
        for (++it; it != sorted_nums.end(); ++it) {
            int num = *it;
            if (num == current_end + 1) {
                current_end = num;
            } else {
                result.push_back({current_start, current_end});
                current_start = num;
                current_end = num;
            }
        }
        result.push_back({current_start, current_end});
        return result;
    }
};
```
efficiency: MEDIUM
time complexity: O(N) for getIntervals, O(log N) for addNum
space complexity: O(N)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Uses a sorted set to store unique values. addNum inserts in O(log N) time. getIntervals processes the sorted set in O(N) to build intervals by checking consecutive elements. Efficient for infrequent getIntervals calls.
